# hejiaying.github.io
personal website
[portfolio.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/27966353/portfolio.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>何佳莹 | Marketing & Brand Strategist</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400&family=Noto+Sans+SC:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
:root{
  --bg:#0C0814;
  --bg2:#110E1C;
  --bg3:#1A1429;
  --surface:#1E1733;
  --surface2:#261E40;
  --purple:#8B5CF6;
  --purple-bright:#A78BFA;
  --purple-dim:#6D28D9;
  --violet:#7C3AED;
  --lavender:#C4B5FD;
  --orchid:#DDD6FE;
  --pink:#F0ABFC;
  --accent:#E879F9;
  --cyan:#67E8F9;
  --text:#F5F3FF;
  --text2:#C4B5FD;
  --text3:#8B80A5;
  --border:rgba(139,92,246,0.15);
  --glow:rgba(139,92,246,0.4);
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;font-size:16px}
body{font-family:'Noto Sans SC','Outfit',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:var(--bg)}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--purple-dim);border-radius:3px}
img{max-width:100%;display:block}
a{color:var(--purple-bright);text-decoration:none}

/* ===== NAV ===== */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;width:100%;z-index:100;padding:1.2rem 4rem;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;background:rgba(12,8,20,0.8);backdrop-filter:blur(24px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);transition:all .3s}
.logo{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);letter-spacing:-.02em}
.logo span{color:var(--purple)}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:2rem;list-style:none}
.nav-links a{color:var(--text3);font-size:.8rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;transition:color .3s;text-decoration:none}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--purple-bright)}
.nav-toggle{display:none;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;padding:4px}
.nav-toggle span{display:block;width:22px;height:2px;background:var(--text);transition:.3s}

/* ===== HERO ===== */
.hero{min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:8rem 4rem 4rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.hero-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none}
.hero-orb{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(100px);opacity:.35}
.hero-orb.o1{width:600px;height:600px;background:var(--purple-dim);top:-10%;right:-10%;animation:float 12s ease-in-out infinite}
.hero-orb.o2{width:400px;height:400px;background:var(--accent);bottom:-15%;left:-5%;animation:float 10s ease-in-out infinite 2s}
.hero-orb.o3{width:300px;height:300px;background:var(--violet);top:40%;left:30%;animation:float 14s ease-in-out infinite 4s}
.hero-grid-lines{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(139,92,246,.04) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(139,92,246,.04) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:60px 60px}
@keyframes float{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-30px)}}

.hero-content{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5rem;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;width:100%;position:relative;z-index:2}
.hero-photo-wrap{flex-shrink:0;position:relative}
.hero-photo{width:280px;height:340px;border-radius:20px;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;border:2px solid var(--border);box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.4)}
.hero-photo-glow{position:absolute;inset:-20px;border-radius:30px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--purple-dim),var(--accent));opacity:.2;filter:blur(30px);z-index:-1}
.hero-badge{position:absolute;bottom:-12px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:100px;padding:.4rem 1.2rem;font-size:.7rem;color:var(--lavender);white-space:nowrap;backdrop-filter:blur(10px)}

.hero-text{flex:1}
.hero-tag{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--purple-bright);margin-bottom:1.5rem;padding:.5rem 1.2rem;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:100px;background:rgba(139,92,246,.08)}
.hero-tag::before{content:'';width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--purple);animation:pulse 2s ease infinite}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.3}}

.hero-text h1{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:4rem;font-weight:700;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:.5rem;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--text) 0%,var(--lavender) 50%,var(--purple-bright) 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text}
.hero-text .subtitle{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:400;font-style:italic;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:1.5rem}
.hero-text p{font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.9;color:var(--text3);font-weight:300;max-width:520px;margin-bottom:2rem}
.hero-actions{display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.btn{padding:.75rem 2rem;border-radius:100px;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.03em;text-decoration:none;transition:all .3s;cursor:pointer;border:none;font-family:inherit;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem}
.btn-glow{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--purple),var(--violet));color:white;box-shadow:0 4px 24px var(--glow)}
.btn-glow:hover{box-shadow:0 6px 36px var(--glow);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.btn-ghost{background:transparent;color:var(--lavender);border:1px solid var(--border)}
.btn-ghost:hover{background:rgba(139,92,246,.1);border-color:var(--purple)}

.hero-stats{display:flex;gap:2.5rem;margin-top:2.5rem;padding-top:2rem;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
.hero-stat-num{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--purple-bright)}
.hero-stat-label{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:.06em;margin-top:.2rem}

/* ===== SECTIONS ===== */
section{padding:6rem 4rem;position:relative}
.section-inner{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto}
.section-label{font-size:.68rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--purple);margin-bottom:.6rem}
.section-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:2.6rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:.5rem}
.section-subtitle{font-size:.9rem;color:var(--text3);font-weight:300;max-width:500px}
.section-head{margin-bottom:3.5rem}
.section-divider{width:40px;height:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--purple),var(--accent));border-radius:2px;margin-top:1rem}

/* ===== ABOUT ===== */
.about{background:var(--bg2)}
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:4rem;align-items:start}
.about-text p{font-size:.9rem;line-height:2;color:var(--text3);font-weight:300;margin-bottom:1.2rem}
.about-cards{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1rem}
.about-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:1.5rem;transition:all .3s;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.about-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--purple),var(--accent));opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s}
.about-card:hover{border-color:var(--purple);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 10px 40px rgba(139,92,246,.1)}
.about-card:hover::before{opacity:1}
.about-card-icon{font-size:1.5rem;margin-bottom:.6rem}
.about-card-title{font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:.3rem}
.about-card-desc{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--text3);line-height:1.5}

/* ===== EDUCATION ===== */
.education{background:var(--bg)}
.edu-cards{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.5rem}
.edu-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:2rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:all .3s}
.edu-card:hover{border-color:var(--purple);box-shadow:0 10px 40px rgba(139,92,246,.1)}
.edu-card-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:1.2rem}
.edu-year{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--purple-bright);font-weight:500;padding:.3rem .8rem;background:rgba(139,92,246,.1);border-radius:100px;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.edu-rank{font-size:.65rem;color:var(--accent);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.05em}
.edu-school{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:.3rem}
.edu-degree{font-size:.85rem;color:var(--lavender);font-weight:400;margin-bottom:.8rem}
.edu-detail{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--text3);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:.8rem}
.edu-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.4rem}
.edu-tag{font-size:.62rem;padding:.2rem .6rem;border-radius:100px;background:rgba(139,92,246,.08);color:var(--lavender);border:1px solid var(--border)}

/* ===== EXPERIENCE ===== */
.experience{background:var(--bg2)}
.exp-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2rem}
.exp-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:2.5rem;transition:all .3s;position:relative}
.exp-card::after{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--purple),var(--accent));border-radius:0 2px 2px 0;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s}
.exp-card:hover{border-color:var(--purple);box-shadow:0 10px 40px rgba(139,92,246,.08)}
.exp-card:hover::after{opacity:1}
.exp-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:1.2rem;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem}
.exp-company{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)}
.exp-role{font-size:.88rem;color:var(--purple-bright);font-weight:500;margin-top:.15rem}
.exp-meta{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--text3);text-align:right}
.exp-projects{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.8rem;margin-top:.8rem}
.exp-proj{padding:1.2rem;background:rgba(139,92,246,.04);border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,.08);border-radius:14px;transition:background .3s}
.exp-proj:hover{background:rgba(139,92,246,.08)}
.exp-proj-title{font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--lavender);margin-bottom:.4rem}
.exp-proj-desc{font-size:.78rem;line-height:1.8;color:var(--text3);font-weight:300}

/* ===== PORTFOLIO ===== */
.portfolio{background:var(--bg);overflow:hidden}
.portfolio-items{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4rem}
.pf-item{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:3rem;align-items:center}
.pf-item.reverse{direction:rtl}
.pf-item.reverse > *{direction:ltr}
.pf-img-wrap{position:relative;border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface);aspect-ratio:16/10}
.pf-img-wrap img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;transition:transform .5s}
.pf-img-wrap:hover img{transform:scale(1.03)}
.pf-img-glow{position:absolute;inset:-30px;background:radial-gradient(circle at center,var(--glow),transparent 70%);opacity:.15;z-index:-1;border-radius:30px}
.pf-content{}
.pf-tags{display:flex;gap:.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:1rem}
.pf-tag{font-size:.62rem;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--purple-bright);padding:.3rem .8rem;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:100px;background:rgba(139,92,246,.08)}
.pf-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:.6rem;line-height:1.3}
.pf-desc{font-size:.82rem;line-height:1.9;color:var(--text3);font-weight:300}
.pf-highlights{margin-top:1rem;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.6rem}
.pf-highlight{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;font-size:.72rem;color:var(--lavender);padding:.3rem .8rem;background:rgba(139,92,246,.06);border-radius:100px;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.pf-highlight::before{content:'✦';font-size:.5rem;color:var(--purple)}

/* ===== TRENDSGZ MEDIA SECTION ===== */
.trendsgz{background:var(--bg2);overflow:hidden}
.trendsgz-hero{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:3rem;align-items:center;margin-bottom:3rem}
.trendsgz-info h3{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:2rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:.8rem}
.trendsgz-info p{font-size:.85rem;line-height:1.9;color:var(--text3);font-weight:300;margin-bottom:1rem}
.trendsgz-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:1rem;margin-top:1.5rem}
.tz-stat{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:1.2rem;text-align:center}
.tz-stat-num{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--purple-bright)}
.tz-stat-label{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--text3);margin-top:.2rem}
.trendsgz-brands{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.6rem;margin-top:1.5rem}
.tz-brand{font-size:.68rem;padding:.3rem .8rem;border-radius:100px;background:rgba(139,92,246,.06);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--lavender)}
.trendsgz-visual{position:relative}
.trendsgz-visual-card{background:linear-gradient(145deg,var(--surface),var(--surface2));border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:2rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.tz-matrix{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:.8rem;margin-top:1rem}
.tz-matrix-item{background:rgba(139,92,246,.06);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:1rem;text-align:center;transition:all .3s}
.tz-matrix-item:hover{border-color:var(--purple);background:rgba(139,92,246,.12)}
.tz-matrix-name{font-size:.8rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:.2rem}
.tz-matrix-desc{font-size:.62rem;color:var(--text3)}
.tz-matrix-fans{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--purple-bright);font-weight:600;margin-top:.3rem}

/* ===== PROJECTS ===== */
.projects{background:var(--bg)}
.proj-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.5rem}
.proj-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:18px;padding:2rem;transition:all .3s;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.proj-card:hover{border-color:var(--purple);transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 16px 50px rgba(139,92,246,.1)}
.proj-icon{font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:1rem}
.proj-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:.5rem;line-height:1.3}
.proj-desc{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--text3);line-height:1.7;font-weight:300}
.proj-tag{display:inline-block;font-size:.6rem;color:var(--purple-bright);padding:.2rem .6rem;background:rgba(139,92,246,.08);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:100px;margin-top:.8rem}

/* ===== SKILLS ===== */
.skills{background:var(--bg2)}
.skills-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1rem}
.skill-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:1.5rem;text-align:center;transition:all .3s}
.skill-card:hover{border-color:var(--purple);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(139,92,246,.08)}
.skill-icon{font-size:1.8rem;margin-bottom:.6rem}
.skill-name{font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:.3rem}
.skill-detail{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--text3);line-height:1.5}

/* ===== CONTACT ===== */
.contact{background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--bg) 0%,var(--bg2) 50%,var(--bg3) 100%);text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;padding:8rem 4rem}
.contact .hero-orb{opacity:.2}
.contact-inner{position:relative;z-index:2}
.contact-items{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:1.5rem;margin-top:2.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.contact-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.8rem;padding:.8rem 1.8rem;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:100px;transition:all .3s}
.contact-item:hover{border-color:var(--purple);background:rgba(139,92,246,.1)}
.contact-icon{font-size:1rem}
.contact-text{font-size:.85rem;color:var(--text2)}
.contact-desc{margin-top:1.5rem;font-size:.9rem;color:var(--text3);font-weight:300;max-width:450px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;line-height:1.8}

/* ===== FOOTER ===== */
footer{background:var(--bg);padding:2rem 4rem;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
footer p{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--text3)}

/* ===== ANIMATIONS ===== */
.fade-up{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px);transition:opacity .7s ease,transform .7s ease}
.fade-up.vis{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
.stagger-1{transition-delay:.1s}
.stagger-2{transition-delay:.2s}
.stagger-3{transition-delay:.3s}

/* ===== RESPONSIVE ===== */
@media(max-width:1024px){
  nav{padding:.8rem 2rem}
  .hero{padding:7rem 2rem 3rem}
  section{padding:4rem 2rem}
  .hero-content{flex-direction:column;text-align:center;gap:2.5rem}
  .hero-text p{margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}
  .hero-actions{justify-content:center}
  .hero-stats{justify-content:center}
  .hero-photo{width:220px;height:270px}
  .hero-text h1{font-size:3rem}
  .edu-cards{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .pf-item,.pf-item.reverse{grid-template-columns:1fr;direction:ltr}
  .trendsgz-hero{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .proj-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .skills-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
}
@media(max-width:768px){
  nav{padding:.8rem 1.2rem}
  .nav-links{display:none;position:absolute;top:100%;left:0;right:0;background:rgba(12,8,20,.98);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);flex-direction:column;padding:1.5rem;gap:1rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .nav-links.open{display:flex}
  .nav-toggle{display:flex}
  .hero{padding:6rem 1.2rem 2rem}
  .hero-text h1{font-size:2.2rem}
  .hero-text .subtitle{font-size:1.1rem}
  section{padding:3rem 1.2rem}
  .section-title{font-size:2rem}
  .about-cards{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .proj-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .skills-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .exp-top{flex-direction:column}
  .exp-meta{text-align:left}
  footer{padding:1.5rem 1.2rem;flex-direction:column;gap:.5rem;text-align:center}
  .contact{padding:4rem 1.2rem}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="logo">J<span>.</span>Y</div>
  <button class="nav-toggle" onclick="document.querySelector('.nav-links').classList.toggle('open')">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </button>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">关于我</a></li>
    <li><a href="#education">教育</a></li>
    <li><a href="#experience">经历</a></li>
    <li><a href="#portfolio">作品集</a></li>
    <li><a href="#skills">技能</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">联系</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg">
    <div class="hero-orb o1"></div>
    <div class="hero-orb o2"></div>
    <div class="hero-orb o3"></div>
    <div class="hero-grid-lines"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-photo-wrap">
      <div class="hero-photo-glow"></div>
      <img class="hero-photo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="何佳莹">
      <div class="hero-badge">📍 LSE · London</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-text">
      <div class="hero-tag">Open to Opportunities</div>
      <h1>何佳莹</h1>
      <div class="subtitle">Marketing & Brand Strategist</div>
      <p>LSE 市场营销硕士，南开大学 & UWTSD 双学位。深耕战略营销、内容运营与品牌增长——以数据驱动洞察，以创意赋能品牌，以技术提升效率。</p>
      <div class="hero-actions">
        <a href="#portfolio" class="btn btn-glow">查看作品集 →</a>
        <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-ghost">联系我</a>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-stats">
        <div><div class="hero-stat-num">4+</div><div class="hero-stat-label">段实习经历</div></div>
        <div><div class="hero-stat-num">Top 5%</div><div class="hero-stat-label">专业排名</div></div>
        <div><div class="hero-stat-num">7.5</div><div class="hero-stat-label">IELTS</div></div>
        <div><div class="hero-stat-num">330</div><div class="hero-stat-label">GRE</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section class="about" id="about">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-head fade-up">
      <div class="section-label">About Me</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">关于我</h2>
      <div class="section-divider"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div class="about-text fade-up">
        <p>我是一名兼具国际视野与本土洞察力的营销人。本科就读于南开大学英语专业（GPA 3.97/4, 前5%），同时通过联合培养项目获得威尔士三一圣大卫大学国际商务管理学位（专业第一，1/33）。目前在伦敦政治经济学院（LSE）攻读市场营销硕士，GPA英制一等。</p>
        <p>实习经历横跨科技巨头（百度）、顶级时尚媒体（时尚芭莎）与互联网安全企业（360集团），从 AI 产品竞品分析、多平台内容运营到大型活动落地，积累了全链路营销实战能力。</p>
        <p>善于运用 Python、SQL 等数据分析工具与 AI 技术提升工作效率，并在 LSE 完成了消费者神经科学与定价策略的前沿研究。持有 Coursera 谷歌广告投放证书与谷歌数字营销专业证书。</p>
      </div>
      <div class="about-cards fade-up stagger-1">
        <div class="about-card">
          <div class="about-card-icon">📊</div>
          <div class="about-card-title">数据驱动营销</div>
          <div class="about-card-desc">Python · R · SPSS · SQL · 用户聚类分析与行为洞察</div>
        </div>
        <div class="about-card">
          <div class="about-card-icon">✍️</div>
          <div class="about-card-title">内容运营</div>
          <div class="about-card-desc">多平台矩阵运营 · SEO优化 · A/B测试 · 信息流投放</div>
        </div>
        <div class="about-card">
          <div class="about-card-icon">🎯</div>
          <div class="about-card-title">品牌战略</div>
          <div class="about-card-desc">竞品分析 · 用户画像 · 定价策略 · 品牌增长</div>
        </div>
        <div class="about-card">
          <div class="about-card-icon">🌍</div>
          <div class="about-card-title">跨文化沟通</div>
          <div class="about-card-desc">中英双语 · CATTI笔译三级 · 中英交传 · 跨国协调</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EDUCATION -->
<section class="education" id="education">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-head fade-up">
      <div class="section-label">Education</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">教育背景</h2>
      <div class="section-divider"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="edu-cards">
      <div class="edu-card fade-up">
        <div class="edu-card-top">
          <span class="edu-year">2025.9 – 2026.9</span>
          <span class="edu-rank">前 5%</span>
        </div>
        <div class="edu-school">伦敦政治经济学院（LSE）</div>
        <div class="edu-degree">硕士 · 市场营销 · 英国伦敦</div>
        <div class="edu-detail">GPA 英制一等。主修营销分析、数字营销、消费者洞察、品牌战略、定价战略、神经消费行为学。</div>
        <div class="edu-tags">
          <span class="edu-tag">G5 院校</span>
          <span class="edu-tag">谷歌广告证书</span>
          <span class="edu-tag">谷歌数字营销证书</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="edu-card fade-up stagger-1">
        <div class="edu-card-top">
          <span class="edu-year">2021.9 – 2025.7</span>
          <span class="edu-rank">GPA 3.97/4</span>
        </div>
        <div class="edu-school">南开大学</div>
        <div class="edu-degree">本科 · 英语 · 天津</div>
        <div class="edu-detail">专业前 5%，TEM4 专四优秀。校级学业优秀奖学金（前 6%）、校级文体奖学金（前 3%），2025 届外国语学院优秀学生。</div>
        <div class="edu-tags">
          <span class="edu-tag">985 院校</span>
          <span class="edu-tag">CET-6 638</span>
          <span class="edu-tag">GRE 330</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="edu-card fade-up stagger-2">
        <div class="edu-card-top">
          <span class="edu-year">2023.9 – 2025.7</span>
          <span class="edu-rank">专业第一 1/33</span>
        </div>
        <div class="edu-school">威尔士三一圣大卫大学</div>
        <div class="edu-degree">本科 · 国际商务管理 · 英国斯旺西</div>
        <div class="edu-detail">GPA 英制一等。主修市场营销实践、数据智能与分析、策略营销与管理、财务管理、合同法。</div>
        <div class="edu-tags">
          <span class="edu-tag">50% 学费减免奖学金</span>
          <span class="edu-tag">联合项目优秀毕业生</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EXPERIENCE -->
<section class="experience" id="experience">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-head fade-up">
      <div class="section-label">Experience</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">工作经历</h2>
      <div class="section-divider"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="exp-list">

      <div class="exp-card fade-up">
        <div class="exp-top">
          <div>
            <div class="exp-company">百度</div>
            <div class="exp-role">战略营销实习生 · 智能云事业群（ACG）</div>
          </div>
          <div class="exp-meta">北京<br>2025.5 – 2025.9</div>
        </div>
        <div class="exp-projects">
          <div class="exp-proj">
            <div class="exp-proj-title">🔍 AI 产品竞品数据库搭建与战略调研</div>
            <div class="exp-proj-desc">独立负责 AI 产品线的竞品追踪与战略调研工作。深度拆解英伟达 GTC、谷歌 I/O、微软 Build 等 20+ 场全球科技大会核心内容。通过 vibe coding 用 Claude 搭建自动化工作流，批量读取大会演讲文稿并生成结构化摘要。从产品功能、定价策略、目标行业、客户分层四个维度，搭建百度智能云与阿里云、华为云、火山引擎的竞品对比数据库；累计撰写 13 份行业洞察报告，将调研方法沉淀为 SOP，使团队后续同类调研周期缩短约 40%。</div>
          </div>
          <div class="exp-proj">
            <div class="exp-proj-title">🎬 百度云智大会 "逆水寒 NPC" 文心模型能力展示</div>
            <div class="exp-proj-desc">独立负责 2025 百度云智大会开场演讲中逆水寒板块文心大模型能力展示的全流程落地。前期与网易逆水寒项目组对接，围绕模型 SFT 技术能力制作 50+ 素材并反复调试筛选；中期 1 周内独立剪辑制作海报、短视频、上屏长版视频、PPT 等多种形式展示素材；后期协调现场技术团队完成联调测试，Demo 在大会主会场顺利上屏呈现。</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="exp-card fade-up">
        <div class="exp-top">
          <div>
            <div class="exp-company">时尚芭莎</div>
            <div class="exp-role">内容运营实习生</div>
          </div>
          <div class="exp-meta">远程<br>2025.1 – 2025.4</div>
        </div>
        <div class="exp-projects">
          <div class="exp-proj">
            <div class="exp-proj-title">📱 多平台内容矩阵运营与广告投放优化</div>
            <div class="exp-proj-desc">每周独立撰写 15 篇产品推送稿件至第三方传播平台，覆盖 Zenith、IWC 等奢侈品腕表品牌专题。进行核心关键词埋入、长尾词布局、标题封面 A/B 测试与标签优化，后台追踪 CTR、阅读完成率与互动数据，3 个月内带动平台自然搜索流量增长 10%；同步协助搜狐、网易等新闻平台信息流广告投放，促进全平台广告 ROI 提升 4%。</div>
          </div>
          <div class="exp-proj">
            <div class="exp-proj-title">🔬 "时尚广州" 子品牌用户认知度调研与账户运营</div>
            <div class="exp-proj-desc">利用 Python 对调研问卷及社交媒体 UGC 评论数据进行用户聚类分析，结合语料库技术提取核心认知词与情感倾向，完善子品牌用户画像与品牌画像。基于分析结果优化账号结构化描述与关键词布局，策划关联热点内容选题，利用 AI 生图工具辅助封面设计，全方位运营小红书、微信公众号等多平台账号。</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="exp-card fade-up">
        <div class="exp-top">
          <div>
            <div class="exp-company">360 集团</div>
            <div class="exp-role">活动运营实习生</div>
          </div>
          <div class="exp-meta">北京<br>2024.5 – 2024.8</div>
        </div>
        <div class="exp-projects">
          <div class="exp-proj">
            <div class="exp-proj-title">🏢 互联网安全大会（ISC·AI）商家展位运营与物料管理</div>
            <div class="exp-proj-desc">负责大会 100+ 参展商家的展位运营与现场落地。逐一对接企业沟通展示诉求与品牌调性，协助完成展位物料设计确认与制作跟进；按行业属性进行区域聚类并设计观众动线；利用 Excel 建立物料统计台账，对 200+ 批次物料进行分类登记与数量核对；大会期间驻场负责物料现场发放与补给调度。</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="exp-card fade-up">
        <div class="exp-top">
          <div>
            <div class="exp-company">逆风教育</div>
            <div class="exp-role">增长运营实习生</div>
          </div>
          <div class="exp-meta">远程<br>2023.1 – 2023.6</div>
        </div>
        <div class="exp-projects">
          <div class="exp-proj">
            <div class="exp-proj-title">📈 抖音账号市场调研与内容策划</div>
            <div class="exp-proj-desc">通过 Python 爬取抖音平台少儿英语垂类头部博主数据，结合 Excel 进行可视化分析，产出 10 余份调研报告。锁定目标用户为 25-35 岁宝妈群体，累计提供 200+ 短视频选题，撰写 2 部长视频深度解析脚本。</div>
          </div>
          <div class="exp-proj">
            <div class="exp-proj-title">🚀 抖音账号从 0 到 1 增长运营与私域转化</div>
            <div class="exp-proj-desc">搭建公域到私域转化闭环，通过火山引擎精准信息流投放，1 周内实现单次集中涨粉 3000+。持续运营 6 个月，策划社群互动活动，形成内容获客—评论区引流—社群沉淀—活动促活的完整增长链路。</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="exp-card fade-up">
        <div class="exp-top">
          <div>
            <div class="exp-company">中国商务部研修中心</div>
            <div class="exp-role">研讨班助理</div>
          </div>
          <div class="exp-meta">北京<br>2023.8 – 2023.9</div>
        </div>
        <div class="exp-projects">
          <div class="exp-proj">
            <div class="exp-proj-title">🌐 赞比亚部级及省市高级官员研讨班</div>
            <div class="exp-proj-desc">全程参与研讨班组织协调与运营支持。编排数周研讨日程，统筹客座教授演讲、企业参访与座谈会。赴武汉担任中英交替口译，完成会议纪要与书面文件翻译。协助对接赞比亚副部长实地考察，独立协调双方日程、安排接待流程并担任现场翻译，最终协助促成副部长的私人采买意向。</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="exp-card fade-up">
        <div class="exp-top">
          <div>
            <div class="exp-company">佳裕达物流</div>
            <div class="exp-role">财务助理 / 报关员助理</div>
          </div>
          <div class="exp-meta">天津<br>2023.7 – 2023.8</div>
        </div>
        <div class="exp-projects">
          <div class="exp-proj">
            <div class="exp-proj-title">📋 合同梳理与报关实操</div>
            <div class="exp-proj-desc">任职于天津分公司从事跨境物流业务。利用 Excel 建立合同台账按业务线分类登记，翻译关键合同条款供管理层审阅；协助财务部进行报表核对；轮岗至业务部参与报关实操，完整经历从接单、制单、申报到放行的国际贸易报关全流程。</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="exp-card fade-up">
        <div class="exp-top">
          <div>
            <div class="exp-company">思科普压缩机</div>
            <div class="exp-role">财务实习生</div>
          </div>
          <div class="exp-meta">天津<br>2021.3 – 2021.5</div>
        </div>
        <div class="exp-projects">
          <div class="exp-proj">
            <div class="exp-proj-title">📊 财务数据整合与客户分析支持</div>
            <div class="exp-proj-desc">使用数据透视表对销售、采购及费用数据进行清洗与整合，支持税务申报。主动对客户采购行为进行拆分分析，基于采购频次与金额构建简易客户分层模型，识别出高频小额与低频大额两类核心客户群体，为销售决策提供数据参考。</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PORTFOLIO -->
<section class="portfolio" id="portfolio">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-head fade-up">
      <div class="section-label">Portfolio</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">作品集</h2>
      <div class="section-subtitle">以下为部分代表性项目成果展示</div>
      <div class="section-divider"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="portfolio-items">

      <!-- 1: 百度上屏 -->
      <div class="pf-item fade-up">
        <div class="pf-img-wrap">
          <div class="pf-img-glow"></div>
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="百度云智大会上屏作品">
        </div>
        <div class="pf-content">
          <div class="pf-tags">
            <span class="pf-tag">百度</span>
            <span class="pf-tag">云智大会</span>
            <span class="pf-tag">文心大模型</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pf-title">百度云智大会 — 文心大模型能力展示上屏作品</div>
          <div class="pf-desc">独立负责 2025 百度云智大会开场演讲中逆水寒板块文心大模型能力展示的全流程落地。与网易逆水寒项目组对接，围绕模型 SFT 技术能力制作 50+ 素材并反复调试筛选，从营销视角优化每版呈现方式，确保技术亮点能被非技术背景观众快速感知。最终制作的海报、短视频、上屏长版视频等展示素材在大会主会场顺利上屏呈现。</div>
          <div class="pf-highlights">
            <span class="pf-highlight">50+ 素材制作</span>
            <span class="pf-highlight">大会主会场上屏</span>
            <span class="pf-highlight">全流程独立负责</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- 2: 行业调研 -->
      <div class="pf-item reverse fade-up">
        <div class="pf-img-wrap">
          <div class="pf-img-glow"></div>
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="AI行业洞察调研">
        </div>
        <div class="pf-content">
          <div class="pf-tags">
            <span class="pf-tag">百度</span>
            <span class="pf-tag">竞品分析</span>
            <span class="pf-tag">战略调研</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pf-title">AI 产品竞品数据库与行业洞察报告</div>
          <div class="pf-desc">在百度智能云战略营销团队，独立负责 AI 产品线竞品追踪。深度拆解英伟达 GTC、谷歌 I/O、微软 Build 等 20+ 场全球科技大会。自主搭建自动化工作流大幅提升调研效率，从产品功能、定价策略、目标行业、客户分层四个维度搭建竞品对比数据库，累计撰写 13 份行业洞察报告并沉淀为标准化 SOP。</div>
          <div class="pf-highlights">
            <span class="pf-highlight">13 份行业报告</span>
            <span class="pf-highlight">20+ 科技大会拆解</span>
            <span class="pf-highlight">调研周期缩短 40%</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- 3: 神经科学 -->
      <div class="pf-item fade-up">
        <div class="pf-img-wrap">
          <div class="pf-img-glow"></div>
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="神经科学研究">
        </div>
        <div class="pf-content">
          <div class="pf-tags">
            <span class="pf-tag">LSE 研究</span>
            <span class="pf-tag">消费者神经科学</span>
            <span class="pf-tag">行为实验</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pf-title">The Trusted Advisor Betrayal Effect</div>
          <div class="pf-desc">探究聊天机器人中嵌入式广告披露方式对用户神经信任与行为意向的影响。团队自主搭建 AI 旅行助手聊天机器人，设计 A/B 对照实验，通过 iMotions 平台同步采集眼动、皮肤电（GSR）、面部表情编码及瞳孔数据，结合问卷测量信任度与使用意向。利用 Python 完成多源数据清洗与统计分析，发现广告透明披露可显著降低用户自主神经应激但同时触发意识层面的怀疑情绪，揭示"披露悖论"现象。</div>
          <div class="pf-highlights">
            <span class="pf-highlight">iMotions 多源生理数据</span>
            <span class="pf-highlight">A/B 对照实验</span>
            <span class="pf-highlight">披露悖论发现</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- 4: 腾讯案例 -->
      <div class="pf-item reverse fade-up">
        <div class="pf-img-wrap">
          <div class="pf-img-glow"></div>
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="腾讯案例调研">
        </div>
        <div class="pf-content">
          <div class="pf-tags">
            <span class="pf-tag">案例研究</span>
            <span class="pf-tag">内容策略</span>
            <span class="pf-tag">增长营销</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pf-title">腾讯混元大模型海外内容营销策略</div>
          <div class="pf-desc">基于海外开发者对中国 AI 的认知现状，设计从"技术认知"到"品牌认同"的三阶内容漏斗策略。第一阶段以技术 Demo 引爆关注，第二阶段通过场景化深度种草提升用户粘性，第三阶段建设开发者生态实现品牌认同。制定模型横评、API 实战教程、破圈内容等三类初期主推内容策略，并规划 12 个月的完整执行节奏。</div>
          <div class="pf-highlights">
            <span class="pf-highlight">三阶内容漏斗</span>
            <span class="pf-highlight">12 个月执行计划</span>
            <span class="pf-highlight">开发者生态策略</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TRENDSGZ MEDIA -->
<section class="trendsgz" id="trendsgz">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-head fade-up">
      <div class="section-label">Media Portfolio</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">时广新媒 · 内容运营实践</h2>
      <div class="section-subtitle">在时尚芭莎实习期间负责"时尚广州"子品牌的用户调研与账号运营</div>
      <div class="section-divider"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="trendsgz-hero fade-up">
      <div class="trendsgz-info">
        <h3>时广新媒矩阵 · TrendsGZ Matrix</h3>
        <p>时广新媒是影响力领先的时尚生活方式新媒体矩阵，旗下包含"时尚广州"、"冷眼奢华观察站"、"食尚教煮"、"羙若生活·Salon"及"时尚小编精分生活"五大新媒体品牌。引导流行不盲从潮流，在喧哗中提炼独家观点、包装新鲜潮流、独创时髦概念。</p>
        <p>在时尚芭莎实习期间，我负责"时尚广州"子品牌的用户认知度调研与账户运营——利用 Python 进行用户聚类分析与情感提取，优化账号定位与关键词布局，策划热点内容选题，全方位运营小红书、微信公众号等多平台账号，直接支撑子品牌社交媒体的内容定位与起号策略落地。</p>
        <div class="trendsgz-stats">
          <div class="tz-stat">
            <div class="tz-stat-num">29.7 亿+</div>
            <div class="tz-stat-label">全网累计曝光量</div>
          </div>
          <div class="tz-stat">
            <div class="tz-stat-num">106 万+</div>
            <div class="tz-stat-label">全网粉丝量</div>
          </div>
          <div class="tz-stat">
            <div class="tz-stat-num">2.08 亿+</div>
            <div class="tz-stat-label">累积阅读量</div>
          </div>
          <div class="tz-stat">
            <div class="tz-stat-num">388 万+</div>
            <div class="tz-stat-label">单篇最高阅读</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="trendsgz-visual">
        <div class="trendsgz-visual-card">
          <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:.5rem">矩阵旗下五大品牌</div>
          <div class="tz-matrix">
            <div class="tz-matrix-item">
              <div class="tz-matrix-name">时尚广州</div>
              <div class="tz-matrix-desc">环球视野 · 湾区风尚</div>
              <div class="tz-matrix-fans">350,000+ 用户</div>
            </div>
            <div class="tz-matrix-item">
              <div class="tz-matrix-name">冷眼奢华观察站</div>
              <div class="tz-matrix-desc">唯物质主义者的精神家园</div>
              <div class="tz-matrix-fans">450,000+ 用户</div>
            </div>
            <div class="tz-matrix-item">
              <div class="tz-matrix-name">食尚教煮</div>
              <div class="tz-matrix-desc">星厨教煮家常菜</div>
              <div class="tz-matrix-fans">250,000+ 用户</div>
            </div>
            <div class="tz-matrix-item">
              <div class="tz-matrix-name">羙若生活·Salon</div>
              <div class="tz-matrix-desc">Z 世代女性社群</div>
              <div class="tz-matrix-fans">4,500+ 成员</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="margin-top:1rem">
            <div style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:.5rem">合作品牌（部分）</div>
            <div class="trendsgz-brands">
              <span class="tz-brand">LVMH</span>
              <span class="tz-brand">Hennessy</span>
              <span class="tz-brand">Rémy Martin</span>
              <span class="tz-brand">CHAUMET</span>
              <span class="tz-brand">Moncler</span>
              <span class="tz-brand">Ferragamo</span>
              <span class="tz-brand">Hilton</span>
              <span class="tz-brand">Four Seasons</span>
              <span class="tz-brand">Ritz-Carlton</span>
              <span class="tz-brand">BMW</span>
              <span class="tz-brand">Lamborghini</span>
              <span class="tz-brand">Longines</span>
              <span class="tz-brand">Blancpain</span>
              <span class="tz-brand">Swatch</span>
              <span class="tz-brand">Shiseido</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROJECTS -->
<section class="projects">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-head fade-up">
      <div class="section-label">Research & Projects</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">项目经历</h2>
      <div class="section-divider"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="proj-grid">
      <div class="proj-card fade-up">
        <div class="proj-icon">🧠</div>
        <div class="proj-title">LSE 消费者神经科学研究</div>
        <div class="proj-desc">探究 AI 聊天机器人中嵌入式广告披露方式对用户信任的影响。通过 iMotions 采集眼动、GSR、面部表情及瞳孔数据，利用 Python 完成多源统计分析，揭示"披露悖论"现象。</div>
        <span class="proj-tag">2026.1 – 2026.4</span>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-card fade-up stagger-1">
        <div class="proj-icon">💰</div>
        <div class="proj-title">BodyPark ATOM AI 健身设备定价策略</div>
        <div class="proj-desc">为 AI 健身硬件初创产品制定数据驱动定价方案。开展用户访谈、发放问卷（N=117），构建 Conditional Logit 模型与层次贝叶斯估计，结合 K-means 聚类识别三类差异化用户群体。</div>
        <span class="proj-tag">2026.1 – 2026.4</span>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-card fade-up stagger-2">
        <div class="proj-icon">🏆</div>
        <div class="proj-title">山海经神兽文创项目（一等奖）</div>
        <div class="proj-desc">南开大学"慧语杯"创业大赛一等奖。负责推广策划与营销落地，调研竞品定价与渠道策略，制定线上线下整合营销方案，策划核心产品售卖渠道、定价组合与促销节奏。</div>
        <span class="proj-tag">2023.4 – 2023.12</span>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-card fade-up">
        <div class="proj-icon">👴</div>
        <div class="proj-title">老年友好型语言服务体系研究（市创优秀）</div>
        <div class="proj-desc">负责研究框架搭建与数据分析。运用 Python 进行语料数据清洗，结合 AntConc 进行词频统计与关键词提取，对 10 万余字语料进行可视化呈现，最终获评市级优秀项目。</div>
        <span class="proj-tag">2022.11 – 2023.5</span>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-card fade-up stagger-1">
        <div class="proj-icon">🤝</div>
        <div class="proj-title">赞比亚部级官员研讨班</div>
        <div class="proj-desc">商务部研修项目管理团队成员。编排研讨日程，统筹演讲与参访环节。赴武汉担任中英交替口译，协助对接赞比亚副部长企业考察，促成私人采买意向。</div>
        <span class="proj-tag">2023.8 – 2023.9</span>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-card fade-up stagger-2">
        <div class="proj-icon">🎓</div>
        <div class="proj-title">志愿服务与课外组织</div>
        <div class="proj-desc">南开大学志愿服务 250+ 小时，威尔士孔子学院 80+ 小时。Fashion 街舞社项目负责人，外院学生会成员，LSE KES 舞蹈领队。钢琴 9 级。</div>
        <span class="proj-tag">课外活动</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SKILLS -->
<section class="skills" id="skills">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-head fade-up">
      <div class="section-label">Skills</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">专业技能</h2>
      <div class="section-divider"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="skills-grid fade-up">
      <div class="skill-card">
        <div class="skill-icon">🐍</div>
        <div class="skill-name">Python</div>
        <div class="skill-detail">数据分析 · 爬虫 · 统计建模 · NLP · 聚类分析</div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card">
        <div class="skill-icon">📈</div>
        <div class="skill-name">数据分析工具</div>
        <div class="skill-detail">R · SPSS · SQL · Excel · WEKA · AntConc</div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card">
        <div class="skill-icon">🎨</div>
        <div class="skill-name">设计 & 剪辑</div>
        <div class="skill-detail">Figma · 剪映 · Arctime · TagAnt</div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card">
        <div class="skill-icon">💼</div>
        <div class="skill-name">办公协作</div>
        <div class="skill-detail">飞书 · Excel 高级 · PPT · 如流</div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card">
        <div class="skill-icon">💬</div>
        <div class="skill-name">语言能力</div>
        <div class="skill-detail">雅思 7.5 · CET-6 638 · 专四优秀 86 · GRE 330</div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card">
        <div class="skill-icon">🌐</div>
        <div class="skill-name">翻译</div>
        <div class="skill-detail">CATTI 笔译三级 · 中英交替口译 · 基础法语/韩语</div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card">
        <div class="skill-icon">📝</div>
        <div class="skill-name">内容营销</div>
        <div class="skill-detail">SEO · A/B 测试 · 信息流投放 · 多平台运营</div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card">
        <div class="skill-icon">🎹</div>
        <div class="skill-name">兴趣爱好</div>
        <div class="skill-detail">钢琴 9 级 · 街舞 · 丰富舞台经验</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section class="contact" id="contact">
  <div class="hero-bg">
    <div class="hero-orb o1"></div>
    <div class="hero-orb o2"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="contact-inner">
    <div class="section-head fade-up" style="text-align:center">
      <div class="section-label" style="text-align:center">Contact</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">联系我</h2>
      <div class="section-divider" style="margin:1rem auto"></div>
    </div>
    <p class="contact-desc fade-up">期待与您交流关于营销、品牌或运营方向的机会</p>
    <div class="contact-items fade-up">
      <div class="contact-item">
        <span class="contact-icon">📧</span>
        <span class="contact-text">hjylorna@gmail.com</span>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-item">
        <span class="contact-icon">📱</span>
        <span class="contact-text">+86 13820933397</span>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-item">
        <span class="contact-icon">💬</span>
        <span class="contact-text">微信: Lornah14</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="logo">J<span>.</span>Y</div>
  <p>© 2026 何佳莹 Jiaying He · All rights reserved.</p>
</footer>

<script>
const obs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('vis'); });
}, { threshold: 0.08, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });
document.querySelectorAll('.fade-up').forEach(el => obs.observe(el));

document.querySelectorAll('.nav-links a').forEach(link => {
  link.addEventListener('click', e => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const t = document.querySelector(link.getAttribute('href'));
    if (t) { t.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }); document.querySelector('.nav-links').classList.remove('open'); }
  });
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
